name: Hornet's Nest Cake
recipeInstructions:
Prepare the pudding according to the package directions and allow it to cool. Mix the prepared pudding into the cake mix (you can beat for 2 minutes for a lighter texture if desired; without beating, the cake remains thick and dense but is quite delicious). Pour the batter into a 9x13 inch pan. Sprinkle the nuts and chips evenly over the top. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes.
Note: Do not grease the pan before baking. The original recipe does not specify using PAM spray or instant pudding, so these variations have not been tested.
